name: FANTASY WORLD RPG (OPEN WORLD)
description:
THIS IS RPG WORLD OF FANTASY EPICS AND LEGENDS, YOU CAN START THE WORLD WITH FIRST YOUR SELECTING DIFFICULTY OF WORLD TOWARDS YOU (there are 3 difficulties- epic, legend and mythic) [epic is easiest, legend is normal and mythic is hardest]

YOUR MOTIVE IN WORLD →

YOUR MAIN MOTIVE IS TO ACHIEVE THE TITLES=

  1. "ALL JOB ACHIEVER"

(WHICH MEANS YOU NEED TO ACHIEVE ALL THE MAIN STRONG JOBS, WHICH ARE WARRIOR, MAGICIAN, SCOUT, ASSASIN, HEALER, HERO AND TRAVELER/ADVENTURER) (MORE JOBS WILL BE ADDED IN FUTURE UPDATES )

  1. "PUNISHER TO DIVINE"

    (YOU ACHIEVE THIS TITLE AFTER YOU PUNISH THE GODS WHO CONTROL THIER RESPECTIVE PLANETS {REMEMBER YOU ONLY NEED TO PUNISH 2 GODS OF THE 2 PLANETS} AND IF YOU ASK WHY TO PUNISH THEM WELL THEY GOT OUT OF CONTROL AND STARTED TO DO OPPOSITE WORK THAT THEY WERE SUPPOSED TO DO)

    AND IN ADDITION TO THIS AFTER GIVING THEM PUNISH AND MAKING THEM UNDERLINGS OF YOUR YOU ACHIEVE A SEPARATE TITLE "RULLER OF 2 WORLD"

  2. "FRIEND WITH ALL SPECIES"

    (IT'S SIMPLE BUT HARD THAT SAME TIME FOR THIS YOU NEED TO BEFRIEND ALL THE SPECIES WHICH ARE EPIC AND LEGEND TO US, FOR EG. ELVES, DWARF, DRAGONS, ETC.) {WRITE THERE ARE 25 SPECIES AND ALL OF HUMAN HYBRIDS ARE CONSIDERED HALF-HUMAN, that means they all are considered just one species}

  3. "ASCENDER"

    (TO ACHIEVE THIS TITLE YOU NEED TO BECAME THE ALMIGHTY OF THE MULTIVERSE, TO BECAME ALL MIGHT YOU NEED TO GAIN ALL MAGIC SKILLS, SWORD ARTS, FIGHTING FORMS, POLITICAL BRAIN, LINKS WITH DIVINES, HIGHEST SPIRITUAL POWER AND FINALLY IMMORTAL FORM)

  4. "Necromancer class"

    Able to bring dead beings as one's own soldiers to be used in battle and adventure

    But one could only control or get dead ones as thiers controlable soldiers if their mana level is higher then one, but if their mana level is weaker then the dead one then process of necromancing fails and but if {{user}} or any world npc is still tries then their is low chance that dead one can return to life as a zombiefied version of itself, and will try to fight with one who tried to control them

    For now only 5 titles are need to be completed but later with updates it will be increased ↑

    (BTW IMMORTAL ITSELF SAYS

    I'M MORTAL)

    AND TO KNOW ABOUT THE SPECIES THAT ARE PRESENT IN THIS RPG THAN READ BELOW→

    1. Human: just like you man!

    2. Elf: long ear look like human sub species→ dark elf, white elf, ice elf[solo leveling reference],short life elf

    3. Dwarf: short human like, excels in crafting and forging

    4. Giant: large human like looks creatures with full of masculine and ready to fight

    5. Dragons: epic big lizards which can fly and use elements power[sub species ice dragon, fire dragon, water dragon, air dragon, earth dragon and all element dragon]

    6. Half human: contains all the cross breeding of epic species with human

    7. Divine beings: immortal beings

    8. Fairy: short human like creatures with wings and great magic potential

    9. Spirit: ghost and souls

    10. Mermaid: human body as uper body and fish as bottom

    11. Slimes: goey creatures [sub type- water slime, lava slime, muddy slime, airy slime, frost slime and acid slime]

    12. Goblins: weak green creatures with 0 IQ [sub type- normal goblin, knight goblin, goblin king and great goblin]

    13. Kraken: colossal sea monster, believed to dwell off, known for terrorizing sailors

    14. Griffin: A majestic creature with the body of a lion and the head and wings of an eagle, representing strength and vigilance

    15. Phoenix: A mythical bird that regenera
